raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Breekſch Zilwekeem bih-\
tees padarra Bohjâ-Eſchannu/\
bet kas us to KUNGU patan-\
jahs/ taps pa-augſtinahts."
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Dauds mekle ta Waldi-\
taja Waign/bet no ta KUNga\
nahk ikatra Teefa."
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Weens netaifus Wihrē\
irr teem Taiſneem weena Ne-\
gantiba/bet kas pareifi ſtaiga/\
tas irr tam Beſdeewigam wee-\
na Negantiba."
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Chee irr tee Wahrdi A-\
gura ta Dehla Jakes/\
Oweena Mahziba/kostah-\
ſtigs irr tas Wihrs no Jtiēka/\
no Jtiēka un Ukala."
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Teechain es eſinu wairak\
neprattigs neka zitti Laudis/ un\
Zilweku Sinnaschana pee man-\
nis ne irr."
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es arri ne eſinu Gudribu\
mahzijees/ nedē swehtu Sinna-\
ſchannu atſinnis."
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kas irr uſkahpis Debbe-\
fis un leija nahzis? Kas aiſturri\
to Webju ſawas Rohrās? Kas\
irr to Uhdeni Drehbes taiſtigs?\
Kas irr wiﬀai Semmei Rohber-\
schas lizzis? Kas irr winna"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Wiſſi Deetwa Wahrdi irr\
ſchkikſti/ wiꞥſch irr par preeſch-\
turramahm Bruunrahm teem/\
kas us winna patanjahs."
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne peeleez neneeka pee\
winna Wahrdceim/ ka wiꞥſch tew\
ne fohta/ un tu tohpi Melkulis\
atrasts."
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Diwejadas Leetas lubdſohs\
es no tewis/ ne leedsi man tahs/\
pirms es nomirstu."
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Neleetiba un Melli tai pa-\
leek tahku no mannim/ Nabba-\
dsibu un Baggatibu man ne\
doht/ padarro mann ar mannii\
peederrigu Matses Teefu."
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ka es pee-ehtdis tewis ne\
aisleedsu un fakku: Kas irr tas\
KUNGS? jeb ka es Nabbags\
tappis ne fohtu/ un to Wahrdii\
mannu Deewa welſti walkoju."
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ne aprunna to Kalpu pee\
fawa Kunga/ ka wiꞥſch tewi ne\
lahd/ un tu tohpi noseedſigs."
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Weena Slakka irr/ kas\
fawu Tehwu nolahd/ un fawu\
Mahti ne twehti."
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Zitta Slakka irr/ kas pat-\
ti par ſchkikſtu turrahs/ un to-\
mer no faweem Sahrueem ne\
irr masgata."
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Zitta Slakka irr/ ka Az-\
zig augſti raugahs/ un winnas\
Azzuplaſtini irr augſti pazelti."
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Zitta Slakka irr/ ka Sch-\
bi ta patt irr ka Sobbinii/ un\
winnas Dserroſsti irr Naschi/\
ka ta tohs Behdigns no Sein-\
Nunnnn mes"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
